results.title: Stock Market Today, April 30: Caterpillar's Jump After Earnings Helped Fuel Surge in Dow
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 30 - Bloomberg
Mag 7 Momentum: Stocks Up on Earnings, Data, Oil

results.summary: S&P 500 rose 1.02% to 7,209.01 (first close above 7,200). Nasdaq +0.89% to 24,892.31. Dow +790.33 pts (+1.62%) to 49,652.14. Caterpillar +10% on earnings beat/raised outlook. Eli Lilly +7% on earnings beat/raised guidance. Meta -9% on AI capex hike to $125-145B. US growth accelerated in Q1 driven by AI-driven business investment.
